# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL Server."
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL Database."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The location for the SQL Server and Database."
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator login name for the SQL Server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator password for the SQL Server."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "sqlServerResourceName": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
    "sqlDatabaseResourceName": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[variables('sqlServerResourceName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(variables('sqlServerResourceName'), '/', variables('sqlDatabaseResourceName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Basic",
        "tier": "Basic"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": "2147483648",
        "sampleName": "",
        "zoneRedundant": false,
        "readScale": "Disabled"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerResourceName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(variables('sqlServerResourceName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]",
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerResourceName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerResourceName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    }
  }
}
